prd.oneLiner: Connect contract requests, document versions, review and approval, signing, expiry and renewal alerts, and reporting.
prd.goal: Achieve 95% or more advance-expiry alert coverage and manage contract review status in one place.
prd.whyNow: Contract files and review history are spread across email and folders, making expiry, renewal, and obligations easy to miss.
prd.problem: Contract files and review history are spread across email and folders, making expiry, renewal, and obligations easy to miss.
prd.solution: Connect contract requests, document versions, review and approval, signing, expiry and renewal alerts, and reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Business or procurement requester
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Contract files and review history are spread across email and folders, making expiry, renewal, and obligations easy to miss.

targets.name: Legal and procurement contract operator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Contract files and review history are spread across email and folders, making expiry, renewal, and obligations easy to miss.

scenarios.text: Business or procurement requester completes contract request and document registration and checks progress.
Legal and procurement contract operator reviews expiry, renewal, and contract-risk reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Achieve 95% or more advance-expiry alert coverage and manage contract review status in one place.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Contract state, terms, and expiry lookup
Review, approval, negotiation history, and signature management
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
